UAObjectType.Description: A generic sensor that read a process value.
Represents a piece of equipment that causes some action to occur.
A custom PID controller with 3 inputs
A boiler used to produce steam for a turbine.

UAVariable.Description: The rate at which the simulation runs.

UAMethod.Description: Causes the Program to transition from the Ready state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Running state to the Suspended state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Suspended state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Ready, Running or Suspended state to the Halted state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Halted state to the Ready state.

UAObjectType.Description: A controller for the flow of a fluid through a pipe.
A controller for the level of a fluid in a drum.
A sensor that reports the level of a liquid in a tank.
A sensor that reports the flow of a liquid through a pipe.
An actuator that controls the flow through a pipe.

UAReferenceType.Description: A reference that indicates a flow between two objects.
A reference that indicates an electrical signal between two variables.

UAVariable.Description: The rate at which the simulation runs.

UAMethod.Description: Causes the Program to transition from the Ready state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Running state to the Suspended state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Suspended state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Ready, Running or Suspended state to the Halted state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Halted state to the Ready state.

UAReferenceType.Description: A reference that indicates a high temperature flow between two objects.

UAObjectType.Description: A program that produces simulated values for a running boiler.

UAVariable.Description: The rate at which the simulation runs.

UAMethod.Description: Causes the Program to transition from the Ready state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Running state to the Suspended state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Suspended state to the Running state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Ready, Running or Suspended state to the Halted state.
Causes the Program to transition from the Halted state to the Ready state.
